creator: mdharnois@home.com
text:
Making all in arabic
/bin/sh ../../libtool --mode=compile cc -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I. -I. -I../.. -I../.. -I../../pango/   -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/X11R6/include  -O -pipe -march=i686 -Wall -I/usr/local/lib/glib-2.0/include -I/usr/local/include/glib-2.0 -c arabic.c
mkdir .libs
cc -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I. -I. -I../.. -I../.. -I../../pango/ -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/X11R6/include -O -pipe -march=i686 -Wall -I/usr/local/lib/glib-2.0/include -I/usr/local/include/glib-2.0 -c arabic.c  -fPIC -DPIC -o .libs/arabic.lo
